packs.description: Default baseline applications and addons. Ready-to-use workflow packs are still being curated.

items.description: Review product requirement documents with structured output
Crawl approved forums and export demand findings
Controlled local wrapper for repository review via opencode
Repo-specific playbook for rebuilding the deepin-color-correction Linglong UAB on Linux hosts
Reset stale Linglong builder state before a deepin-color-correction rebuild
Rebuild deepin-color-correction Linglong UAB using the shortest known-good path
Generate a structured AI daily news digest from multiple Chinese and English sources and hand off to a local mail sender
Triage bug reports or requirement-like issues by searching for duplicates and structuring the next action
Break a specification into an Epic plus implementation backlog tickets
Extract UnionTech AI point dashboard data from the live logged-in page and optionally write workbook totals
Collect requirements from forum, email, and product feedback sources and generate normalized markdown or Excel outputs
Analyze raw requirement text into structured fields such as type, module, complexity, scenario, and expected behavior
Score and rank requirements across six dimensions to produce a P0 to P4 priority level
Guide a user through structured requirement conversations and generate Problem Framing, SRD, or PRD outputs
Send plaintext email using an SMTP configuration provided entirely through environment variables
Analyze day-by-day UOS AI app stats from a current aggregated JSON payload
Compare a morning-captured UOS AI response set against a later aggregated JSON payload
Inspect row count and date coverage in a benchmark Excel workbook
Compare benchmark workbook totals against a morning captured UOS AI response set
Baseline GitHub CLI application used by many agent workflows and registry operations

commands: type -p curl >/dev/null || sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y curl

echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list >/dev/null
